title: Void Pack
body:
Void Pack is a hand-painted pixel art resource pack inspired by the emptiness, silence, and mystery of the void.


Dark tones, soft contrasts, and subtle details give the interface a calm, almost otherworldly feel.

The hotbar and inventory fade into the background, letting the world speak for itself.

Selected items and blocks are reimagined with a void-touched look, while a custom breaking animation adds a smooth, immersive flow to mining.

Every texture is painted by hand in graphic software, giving the pack a personal, crafted soul rather than a mechanical feel.

This pack doesn’t try to change everything.
It changes just enough.
Perfect for players who enjoy atmosphere, and a quiet, pixel-art void aesthetic.
